gtc.app.name: gtc
gtc.arg.debug_router.help: Enprime binè rezoud la ak agiman yo sou stderr anvan exec.
gtc.arg.key.help: Kle otorizasyon pou tenant ki espesifye a.
gtc.arg.locale.help: Lokal UI pou èd/sòti gtc (tag BCP-47).
gtc.cmd.doctor.about: Tcheke si binè Greentic obligatwa yo disponib nan PATH.
gtc.cmd.install.about: Enstale zouti Greentic epi, si ou vle, atifak tenant otorize yo.
gtc.cmd.setup.about: Pase atravè greentic-setup (jesyon sik lavi pake a).
gtc.err.bin_missing_setup: greentic-setup pa jwenn nan PATH. Enstale ak: cargo install greentic-setup
gtc.err.install_dir: Echèk pou rezoud repèrtwa enstalasyon yo.
gtc.err.invalid_manifest: Manifest enstalasyon tenant la pa valab.
gtc.err.key_required: Yon kle obligatwa pou enstalasyon tenant.
gtc.install.public_mode: Ap enstale zouti piblik Greentic yo.
gtc.install.summary_failed: Enstalasyon atifak tenant yo fini ak echèk.
gtc.install.summary_ok: Enstalasyon atifak tenant yo fini avèk siksè.
gtc.install.using_env_key: Ap itilize kle tenant ki soti nan varyab anviwònman {env}.
